SharedBandwidthInquiry.bandwidthInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. Must be an integer between 1 and 200.
SharedBandwidthInquiry.count: Number of shared bandwidths. Defaults to 1.
SharedBandwidthInquiry.ipNum: Number of IPs in the shared bandwidth.
SharedBandwidthInquiry.billing: Billing information, supporting prepaid and postpaid (bandwidth, 95th percentile) methods.
SharedBandwidthInquiry.billing.billingMethod: Billing method: ByTraffic, ByBandwidth, ByPeak95 (postpaid shared bandwidth only), or ByNetrafficMax (postpaid shared bandwidth only).
SharedBandwidthInquiry.billing.reservation: Reservation information. Not required for postpaid; must be set for prepaid.
